name: Gelato Alla Vaniglia (Vanilla Ice Cream)
recipeIngredient: 1 Vanilla bean, split lengthwise and scraped out (about 4 inches)
recipeInstructions:
1. Split the vanilla bean lengthwise and scrape out the seeds into a bowl.
2. In an enamel pan, combine milk, cream, sugar, and scraped vanilla bean pieces.
3. Heat over low heat until just reaching boiling point (scalding).
4. In a separate bowl, beat egg yolks with salt until foamy.
5. Gradually whisk in the hot cream mixture into the yolks to prevent curdling.
6. Pour the custard back into the pan and place on the lowest heat setting.
7. Stir constantly until the mixture thickens enough to coat the back of a metal spoon.
8. Strain through a fine sieve into a bowl and chill thoroughly before churning in an ice cream maker.
(Note: The small specks of vanilla bean should not be cause for concern; they indicate high-quality ingredients used.)
